title: SagerFX
description: A lib Mod, Provide custom special effects rendering.
body:
SA Special Effects [SAFX] is a mod used to provide special effects rendering, which can generate custom particle combinations and trailing rendering methods independent of the original particles. Its custom special effects system comes from the [TG] Techguns and is now undergoing independent maintenance upgrades and high-level updates. Thank you to pWn3d1337 for their contribution to this mod.
After communicating with pWn3d1337, this mod declares that it is not an official mod for TechgunsMod.
The code of this mod is open sourced under the MIT license, and the texture materials included in this mod are released under the CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 license.

PS:Some of the carriers for generating special effects in the display images come from my other mods (not yet released).
